name: Silo Pharma, Inc.
summary: Overview We are a developmental stage biopharmaceutical and cryptocurrency company. Our therapeutics focus is on developing novel therapeutics that address underserved conditions including PTSD, stress-induced anxiety disorders, fibromyalgia, and central nervous system (CNS) diseases. We are focused on developing novel therapies that include conventional drugs and psychedelic formulations. The Companys lead program, SPC-15, is an intranasal drug targeting PTSD and stress-induced anxiety disorder...
